title: そのままの自分でボーノボーノ♪

text_block_list.text:
One day, while taking a trip to the park, I see a
student standing amongst an energetic crowd of
people.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow! So many people showed up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They're filming a movie based on a manga! Didn't
you hear about it? There were so many rumors at
school! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh wow, Dober came to see it too!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, the actress playing the main
character is so cute!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ah...
Tch... I can't see at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...What am I even doing? I should just go home.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Alley-oop!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you—AH!

Hishi Akebono raises Mejiro Dober above the
crowd!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: How's that? Can you see better now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh, um, yeah... Wow, she really is cute! So pretty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Akebono. But... why are you here?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I saw you right at the back, trying to peek over
the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Are you a fan of that actress?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?! Of course not!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Do I look like I'd be a fan of such a beautiful
woman?

text_block_list.name: Actress
text_block_list.text:
Hey, girl with the pigtails! Ever thought about
acting?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Whoa, no way! Akebono, that woman... She's...

text_block_list.name: Actress
text_block_list.text:
Wow, now that I've got a good look at you,
you're even taller than I thought! You really stand
out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! I'm pretty good at being big!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's great for my winning concerts, 'cause even
fans at the back of the audience can get a good
look at my dance moves!

text_block_list.name: Actress
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how stunning. That confidence makes you
shine.

text_block_list.name: Actress
text_block_list.text:
It's truly a shame, but I'm guessing that since
you're a racer, scouting you would be out of the
question?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm flattered, but I'm afraid so. Thanks anyway!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Akebono. You're incredible. So... confident.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Um... excuse me! Could you... please sign this?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... wasn't that great, Dober?! ♪ You look so
happy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...It's thanks to you, Akebono. You make being
yourself look so easy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...So I figured I should at least have the
confidence to be myself when talking to one of
my favorite actresses.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ooh! That's so buono! ☆
